name: eBPF Audit Lane Validation
description: Validates that the eBPF audit daemon attaches probes, captures events from agent UIDs, and publishes them to the event bus.
runner_note: This scenario runs via test/phase4-ebpf.sh (not agent-sim). It requires root, CAP_BPF, and kernel >= 5.6 with BTF. Run inside the VM after provisioning with scripts/vm.sh phase4-ebpf-deps.

phases.name: daemon_startup
phases.description: Start eBPF audit daemon, verify probe attachment

phases.name: agent_event
phases.description: Trigger agent activity, capture eBPF audit events on bus
